title: Automatos Academy
tagline: A+ prep. Only top people qualify.

tracks.name: Claude Certified Architect — Foundations
tracks.summary: Anthropic's first official technical credential. Design and ship production-grade Claude systems at enterprise scale.

tracks.name: AI Explained
tracks.summary: Never touched AI? Start here. Plain-English answers to what an agent is, why there are so many models, OpenAI vs Claude, what a context window is, knowledge graphs, and MCP — no jargon, no experience needed.

tracks.name: AI Business Foundations
tracks.summary: Run your business with AI — plain English, no exam. Nine modules from “what actually is AI?” to one real automation shipped in your own business.

tracks.name: Automatos Platform Architect
tracks.summary: Master the Automatos platform end to end — agents, skills, knowledge & tools, playbooks, missions, memory, deliverables, surfaces and governance — then prove it by shipping a real reference build. Eleven hands-on modules, no exam.

tracks.name: OpenAI Architect (planned)
tracks.summary: Same engine, a future vendor track. Drops in as content — no rebuild.

tracks.name: GitHub Copilot Certification — GH-300
tracks.summary: Microsoft & GitHub's developer credential for GitHub Copilot — features & agents, responsible use, data & architecture, prompt engineering, productivity, and privacy safeguards.

tracks.name: GitHub Advanced Security — GH-500
tracks.summary: GitHub & Microsoft's secure-SDLC credential — Secret Protection, Supply Chain Security, Code Security (CodeQL), security operations & remediation at scale, and GHAS administration.

tracks.name: AI Security — LLM & Agent Security
tracks.summary: Defensive-security skills for people who build and run LLM apps and agents — the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (2025), MITRE ATLAS, and NIST AI 600-1, from threat model to red-teaming your own app. No exam.

tracks.name: Cross-Vendor Fluency
tracks.summary: Provider-agnostic judgement — OpenAI (API + Agents SDK), Google (Gemini & Vertex AI), open weights (Llama, Ollama, Hugging Face), and a ≥2-provider portability capstone. No exam.

tracks.name: Generative AI Leader
tracks.summary: Google Cloud's business-leader credential for generative AI — gen-AI fundamentals, Google Cloud's gen-AI offerings, techniques to improve model output, and gen-AI business strategy. Four weighted domains from the official exam guide.

tracks.name: AI Governance Professional — AIGP
tracks.summary: The IAPP's credential for governing AI across its lifecycle — foundations of AI governance, the laws/standards/frameworks that apply (EU AI Act, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001), and governing AI development and deployment in the enterprise.
